title: Hypercode diff v1
description: Output of `hypercode diff --format json`: the affected-node set between two hypercode.ir/v2 documents, with reasons (old/new value and winning rule). The machine-readable invalidation feed for incremental regeneration (HC-113).

node.description: Selector-identity path from the root, e.g. 'Service > APIServer > Listen'.

properties.description: Present for kind=modified: the property-level differences.

old.description: Scalar text of the old value.

new.description: Scalar text of the new value.

winner.description: For kind=added: the rule that introduced the value ('selector @ file:line').
